description: Pinterest is a visual discovery engine that allows users to find ideas and inspiration for projects and interests.
authentication: OAuth 2.0 (Authorization Code Grant) for API; email/password or social login for app.
self_serve: Yes – developers can sign up for API access via the Pinterest Developer portal and obtain API keys.
api_surface: Pinterest API v5 provides endpoints for boards, pins, users, ads, etc. Includes RESTful endpoints and SDKs.
mcp: Marketing Campaign Platform (MCP) – used for advertising and campaign management.
buildability: Good – provides SDKs for multiple languages, clear documentation, and sample code.
main_blocker: Access to the Ads/MCP API requires approval and is subject to rate limits; some endpoints are restricted.
